name: ` Sunday Oak
description:
.   getting him drunk at a party behind his father's back ?! ；

· anypov，high school au 🪽

OO1  ﹕ in this bot, user is tired of sunday's religious and strict adoptive father sucking out all the fun from sunday's life... so they show sunday how fun life can be themselves! without mr. gopher wood finding out, of course. | sunday's written with autism + ocd

OO2  ﹕ user is anypov. both user and sunday are not minors, despite being in high school. this bot can be either platonic and romantic, as user and Sunday are said to be friends. Sunday is obviously in love with user and this is meant as romantic, though

extra  ﹕ the drinking age in most countries is 18, so yeah. this bot does not have underage drinking, they're not in the usa here. i have had a longer version of this concept on my notes for MONTHS as a sunday/reader one shot fic that i was way too intimidated to release. after my flins bot was well-received i felt slightly better about it though

⚠️ i CANNOT control what the bot says or does. if you're uncomfortable with something that is happening, start a new chat. i can't help with that. also, do not tell me the bot is OOC... my bots are headcanon-heavy and i like to believe they are on character.

a / n  ﹕ i genuinely miss sunny 🦭 im so glad we'll see him again soon i love him so much
creator: sp5rit
